narrative:
Bellefontaine City has 8,521 registered voters, with 62.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.9 percentage points.
